pdg_node.informal_desc: Normalize the raw PPG waveform to a standard amplitude range so that downstream peak detection is amplitude-invariant.

declaration.name: normalize_ppg_signal
declaration.docstring: Normalize the raw PPG waveform to a standard amplitude range so that downstream peak detection is amplitude-invariant.

declaration.docstring: Normalize the raw PPG waveform to a standard amplitude range so that downstream peak detection is amplitude-invariant.

pdg_node.statement: (ppg_normalized: 1-D numeric array, sampling_rate: positive integer (Hz)) -> tuple[1-D numeric array, positive integer (Hz)]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Double the temporal resolution of the normalized PPG by resampling to 2× the original length, and update the effective sampling rate accordingly, improving peak localization precision.

declaration.name: upsample_ppg_signal
declaration.type_signature: (ppg_normalized: 1-D numeric array, sampling_rate: positive integer (Hz)) -> tuple[1-D numeric array, positive integer (Hz)]
declaration.docstring: Double the temporal resolution of the normalized PPG by resampling to 2× the original length, and update the effective sampling rate accordingly, improving peak localization precision.

pdg_node.statement: (ppg_upsampled: 1-D numeric array, sampling_rate_up: positive integer (Hz)) -> tuple[1-D integer array, 1-D numeric array]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Identify the sample indices of systolic peaks in the upsampled PPG signal and obtain the cleaned (filtered) version of the signal used during peak detection.

declaration.name: detect_systolic_peaks

pdg_node.statement: (ppg_upsampled: 1-D numeric array, peaks: 1-D integer array) -> positive integer (samples)
pdg_node.informal_desc: Derive a fixed symmetric half-window size (in samples) for segmenting individual heart cycles, based on the average inter-peak distance in the upsampled signal.

declaration.name: compute_beat_window_half_width
declaration.type_signature: (ppg_upsampled: 1-D numeric array, peaks: 1-D integer array) -> positive integer (samples)
declaration.docstring: Derive a fixed symmetric half-window size (in samples) for segmenting individual heart cycles, based on the average inter-peak distance in the upsampled signal.

pdg_node.statement: (peaks: 1-D integer array, ppg_cleaned: 1-D numeric array, beat_bound: positive integer (samples)) -> list of 1-D numeric arrays
pdg_node.informal_desc: Iterate over interior peaks (excluding the first and last to avoid boundary errors), slice a symmetric window of width 2×beat_bound centred on each peak from the cleaned signal, and collect only fully-valid, non-truncated beat segments into the output list.
